title: Find Missed Vertebral Fractures
summary: Detect vertebral fracture language in radiology text and check whether osteoporosis evaluation was triggered.
problem_statement: Vertebral fractures can be described in reports without triggering downstream osteoporosis workup.

inputs.name: report_text
inputs.description: Report text that may mention vertebral compression fractures.

inputs.name: followup_summary
inputs.description: Whether osteoporosis evaluation has already been initiated.

rule_sets.summary: If vertebral fracture language is present without downstream evaluation, flag a likely missed diagnosis pathway.

examples: The report mentions a vertebral compression fracture but I do not see workup.
